positive: A retro 1970s style illustration of a cosmic sloth riding a pastel-colored skateboard through a nebula. Mid-century modern aesthetic, distressed screen print texture, warm earthy tones (mustard, burnt orange, avocado green), vector art style, highly saturated, bold lines.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealism, modern gradient
